message:
fix: native polyfills now properly override JS fallbacks

- require.zig creates _modules object first
- path.zig and other polyfills add to _modules directly
- Prevents JS polyfill from overriding native Zig implementations

Results:
- path.join: 305ms -> 30ms (10x faster, now uses native Zig)
- Test average: 90ms -> 45ms (2x faster)
